<div align="center">
  <img src="media/banner.svg" alt="Awesome Illes Balears">
  <br><br>
  <a href="https://awesome.re"><img src="https://awesome.re/badge-flat.svg" alt="Awesome"></a>
  <br><br>
  <p>Una selección de software open source que da soporte específico a les Illes Balears, sus municipios, consells insulars e instituciones.</p>
</div>

## Contenido

<!--lint disable awesome-list-item-->

- [Administración y Gobierno](#administración-y-gobierno)
- [Medio Ambiente y Oceanografía](#medio-ambiente-y-oceanografía)
- [Transporte y Movilidad](#transporte-y-movilidad)
  - [Mallorca](#mallorca)

<!--lint enable awesome-list-item-->

**Leyenda:** Cada entrada muestra: ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/badge/%E2%AD%90-grey?style=flat-square) estrellas, ![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/badge/commit-grey?style=flat-square) actividad, ![Language](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-grey?style=flat-square) lenguaje, ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-grey?style=flat-square) licencia, [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) etiqueta de institución/ubicación, ([Demo](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-illes-balears)) demo en vivo. Todas las insignias son clicables y se actualizan automáticamente. Las etiquetas enlazan a las páginas oficiales de cada institución.

## Administración y Gobierno

- [Carpeta Ciutadana](https://github.com/GovernIB/carpeta) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/carpeta?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/carpeta/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/carpeta?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/carpeta/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/carpeta?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/carpeta) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/carpeta?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/carpeta/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Carpeta ciudadana digital del Govern de les Illes Balears.
- [Dir3CAIB](https://github.com/GovernIB/dir3caib) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/dir3caib?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/dir3caib/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/dir3caib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/dir3caib/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/dir3caib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/dir3caib) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/dir3caib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/dir3caib/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Servidor local del Directorio Común de Unidades Orgánicas (Dir3) para las aplicaciones de la CAIB.
- [DigitalIB](https://github.com/GovernIB/digitalib) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/digitalib?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/digitalib/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/digitalib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/digitalib/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/digitalib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/digitalib) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/digitalib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/digitalib/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Plataforma de digitalización y generación de copias auténticas de documentos de la CAIB.
- [EnviaFIB](https://github.com/GovernIB/enviafib) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/enviafib?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/enviafib/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/enviafib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/enviafib/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/enviafib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/enviafib) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/enviafib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/enviafib/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Servicio de envío de documentos a PortaFIB para firma digital.
- [GenApp](https://github.com/GovernIB/genapp) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/genapp?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/genapp/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/genapp?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/genapp/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/genapp?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/genapp) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/genapp?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/genapp/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Generador de aplicaciones para el entorno de desarrollo del Govern de les Illes Balears.
- [Helium](https://github.com/GovernIB/helium) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/helium?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/helium/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/helium?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/helium/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/helium?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/helium) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/helium?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/helium/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Gestor de expedientes administrativos del Govern de les Illes Balears.
- [InterDoc](https://github.com/GovernIB/interdoc) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/interdoc?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/interdoc/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/interdoc?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/interdoc/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/interdoc?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/interdoc) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/interdoc?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/interdoc/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Sistema de intercambio de documentos por referencia entre aplicaciones de la CAIB.
- [PINBAL](https://github.com/GovernIB/pinbal) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/pinbal?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/pinbal/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/pinbal?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/pinbal/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/pinbal?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/pinbal) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/pinbal?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/pinbal/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Plataforma de Interoperabilidad de les Illes Balears.
- [PortaFIB](https://github.com/GovernIB/portafib) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/portafib?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/portafib/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/portafib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/portafib/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/portafib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/portafib) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/portafib?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/portafib/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Portafirmas digital del Govern de les Illes Balears.
- [Registre](https://github.com/GovernIB/registre) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/registre?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/registre/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/registre?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/registre/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/registre?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/registre) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/registre?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/registre/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Aplicación web de registro de anotaciones de entrada y salida.
- [RolSac](https://github.com/GovernIB/rolsac) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/rolsac?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/rolsac/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/rolsac?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/rolsac/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/rolsac?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/rolsac) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/rolsac?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/rolsac/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Gestor de contenidos administrativos del Govern de les Illes Balears.
- [SISTRA](https://github.com/GovernIB/sistra) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/GovernIB/sistra?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/GovernIB/sistra/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/GovernIB/sistra?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/sistra/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/GovernIB/sistra?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/sistra) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GovernIB/sistra?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/GovernIB/sistra/blob/master/LICENSE) [![CAIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/CAIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.caib.es/) - Sistema de Tramitación Administrativa de les Illes Balears.

## Medio Ambiente y Oceanografía

- [API Examples SOCIB](https://github.com/socib/API_examples) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/socib/API_examples?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/socib/API_examples/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/socib/API_examples?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/API_examples/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/socib/API_examples?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/API_examples) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/socib/API_examples?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/API_examples/blob/master/LICENSE) [![SOCIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/SOCIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.socib.es/) - Notebooks Python para descubrir y procesar datos oceanográficos de les Illes Balears vía la API de SOCIB.
- [Glider Toolbox](https://github.com/socib/glider_toolbox) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/socib/glider_toolbox?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/socib/glider_toolbox/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/socib/glider_toolbox?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/glider_toolbox/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/socib/glider_toolbox?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/glider_toolbox) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/socib/glider_toolbox?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/glider_toolbox/blob/master/LICENSE) [![SOCIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/SOCIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.socib.es/) - Scripts MATLAB/Octave para gestionar datos de la flota de gliders oceanográficos de SOCIB en les Illes Balears.
- [Grumers](https://github.com/socib/grumers) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/socib/grumers?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/socib/grumers/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/socib/grumers?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/grumers/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/socib/grumers?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/grumers) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/socib/grumers?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/grumers/blob/master/LICENSE) [![SOCIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/SOCIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.socib.es/) - Aplicación web Django para recopilar datos de avistamientos de medusas en les Illes Balears.
- [Seaboard SOCIB](https://github.com/socib/seaboard) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/socib/seaboard?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/socib/seaboard/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/socib/seaboard?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/seaboard/commits/master) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/socib/seaboard?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/seaboard) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/socib/seaboard?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/socib/seaboard/blob/master/LICENSE) [![SOCIB](https://img.shields.io/badge/SOCIB-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.socib.es/) - Paneles de visualización en tiempo real de datos oceánicos costeros de SOCIB para el sector turístico de les Illes Balears.

## Transporte y Movilidad

### Mallorca

- [mallorca_transit_services](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services/commits/main) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/mallorca_transit_services/blob/main/LICENSE) [![Mallorca](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mallorca-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.tib.org/) - API pública para acceder a los servicios de transporte de Mallorca.
- [ViaMallorca](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca) [![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca?style=flat-square&label=%E2%AD%90)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca/stargazers) [![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca/commits/main) [![Language](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/top/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/open-transport-mallorca/ViaMallorca/blob/main/LICENSE) [![Mallorca](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mallorca-8B0000?style=flat-square)](https://www.tib.org/) - Aplicación para seguir autobuses en toda Mallorca con horarios, rutas e información en tiempo real.

## Insignia

Si tu proyecto aparece en esta lista, puedes añadir una de estas insignias a tu README para que la gente lo sepa.

<!--lint disable double-link-->

![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000) ![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000) ![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=plastic&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000) ![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000)

Flat (por defecto):
```markdown
[![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000)](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-illes-balears#readme)
```

Flat square:
```markdown
[![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000)](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-illes-balears#readme)
```

Plastic:
```markdown
[![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=plastic&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000)](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-illes-balears#readme)
```

For the badge (grande):
```markdown
[![listed on awesome-illes-balears](https://img.shields.io/badge/listed%20on-awesome--illes--balears-FFD700?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&labelColor=8B0000)](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-illes-balears#readme)
```

## Contribuir

Las contribuciones bienvenidas. Lee las [directrices de contribución](contributing.md) antes de enviar un pull request.

## Nota

Esta lista se centra en software open source que da **soporte específico a les Illes Balears** o que incluye funcionalidades relevantes para usuarios en esta comunidad autónoma. No se incluye software genérico solo por estar creado por desarrolladores baleares.

## Descargo de responsabilidad

No se aceptan proyectos relacionados con pornografía, contenido NSFW, loterías o apuestas, religión, política partidista ni cualquier otro tema controvertido. Esta lista pretende ser un recurso técnico neutral y útil para la comunidad de desarrolladores.
